---
title: GPU-accelerated Python
title-block-banner: true
---

:::{layout="[[10], [5, 5]]"}

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[GPUs on the Alliance clusters](gpu_clusters.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Arrays with &nbsp;![](img/icon_cupy.png){width="1.3em"}](gpu_cupy.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[DataFrames with &nbsp;![](img/logo_polars.png){width="2.5em"}&nbsp; and &nbsp;![](img/logo_rapids.png){width="2.8em"}&nbsp; cuDF](gpu_polars.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::
